meaning: adj.有席子的,缠结的,纠缠的,无光泽的,暗淡的
examples: She had matted hair and torn, dusty clothes.
The dog's fur was matted with blood.
Her roommate Louise was still in bed in their six-tatami matted room when Lucie left.
Most of the animals' coats were heavily matted and they were also suffering from skin, eye and teeth problems.
He lives alone, aside from a stray calico cat with matted fur, which he has named El Gato and sometimes feeds.
